text.title: Weekly GSC Diagnostic Template Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Weekly GSC Diagnostic Template. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Compare last 7 days vs prior 7 days on clicks AND impressions per query — surface ≥5 winners and ≥5 losers by absolute delta.
rule.rationale: Top-mover lens isolates trend changes from steady-state; <5 is noise, >10 hides the action.

rule.statement: For each top mover, classify intent: informational / commercial / navigational. Flag if landing-page intent != query intent.
rule.rationale: Intent mismatch drives high impressions + low CTR; un-flagged it persists for months.

rule.statement: Track pages discovered / indexed / excluded weekly. Indexed ratio <70% of discovered = action required.
rule.rationale: Indexation gap is the hidden CTR ceiling; review without it is partial.

rule.statement: Every weekly review produces ≥1 named action with owner + due date. 'Monitor' is not an action.
rule.rationale: Without forced action, weekly review collapses into status report.

rule.statement: Keep last 12 weeks of diagnostic spec files. Quarterly: scan for stale actions and recurring losers.
rule.rationale: Without rolling snapshot, slow-rotating losers escape attention.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-weekly-gsc-diagnostic-template.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
